news_items.headline: Red Sox post 11th straight win, longest streak in a decade, move into AL wild-card spot
news_items.summary: The Red Sox opened the second half by sweeping the first-place Rays.

news_items.headline: Garrett Mitchell provides heroics in thrilling Brewers 2-1 walk-off victory
news_items.summary: Mitchell reaches base three times and leads the Brewers to their 60th win of the season

news_items.headline: Hughes looks the part, but quiet Rockies fall 7-2 to Reds
news_items.summary: Gabriel Hughes allowed two runs over 5.1 innings, but Colorado managed just six hits and went 0-for-6 with runners in scoring position.

news_items.headline: With 1st 11-game win streak in 10 years, Sox claw their way back to .500
Taylor Ward’s eighth-inning home run caps a 3-2 Orioles comeback in Houston
news_items.summary: The Orioles were mostly stifled by Houston’s starting pitching, but against reliever Bryan King, the Birds pulled off a two-run go-ahead rally.

news_items.headline: Astros Fall 3-2 to Orioles as King Falters Again
news_items.summary: The second half of the season is officially underway. Unfortunately for Houston, they’ve started off on the wrong foot, disappointing the assembled crowd of 31,867 with a late inning blown lead. Orioles 3 Astros 2. The Orioles have now won five in a row and have passed Houston in the wildcard standings. Peter […]

news_items.headline: Yankees' Aaron Boone owns costly decision to have Gerrit Cole face Max Muncy: 'That's on me'
